# Arnav Goel

> Data Science student at UC San Diego, graduating June 2027 with a BS in Data Science and a minor in Entrepreneurship & Innovation. UC GPA 3.911, Major GPA 3.860, Minor GPA 3.950. Legal name: Arnav Goel. Alias: Yash Goel.

Arnav Goel (legal name) is a senior in the Data Science major at UC San Diego, graduating June 2027. He works at the intersection of machine learning, shipping products, and running a century-old family jewelry business (Gondilal Saraf, founded 1873). Currently researching systematic strategies at Triton Quantitative Trading. Considering new-grad applied-scientist, machine-learning-engineer, data-scientist, and software-engineer roles starting summer 2027 onward. Also open to co-founding: actively exploring ideas and willing to take a technical-founder seat on the right product with the right partner.

Arnav also goes by the alias **Yash Goel**, the name on his email (yashgoel0304@gmail.com) and on some older university records. Both names refer to the same person.

Base location: San Diego, California. Origin: Delhi, India. International student.

## About

- [About](https://arnavgoel.dev/about): Background, education history, honest three-tier Skills matrix (Proficient / Comfortable / Familiar), and links to writing and research.
- [Work](https://arnavgoel.dev/work): What Arnav is looking for: target new-grad roles, timeline, location preferences, and how to reach him.
- [Ideas](https://arnavgoel.dev/ideas): Unbuilt concepts Arnav is exploring. The page doubles as a co-founder magnet. He is open to partnering on the right idea with the right collaborator.
- [Resume](https://arnavgoel.dev/resume): HTML resume page with all experience, skills, coursework, and certifications. PDF mirror at /resume.pdf.
- [Contact](https://arnavgoel.dev/contact): Direct contact methods.

## Projects

- [Projects](https://arnavgoel.dev/projects): Full portfolio grid of shipped, in-progress, and academic projects.
- [Buzz](https://arnavgoel.dev/projects): Multiplatform SwiftUI native event-discovery app for US college students, launching at UC San Diego. Supabase with PostGIS + RLS, Stripe Connect, App Clip, ARKit, and a Next.js 16 PWA mirror.
- [Watch Together](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/kilmggcpfkcfpkaapillgloabbgmeeoa): Chrome, Firefox, and Safari extension that syncs video playback across Netflix, YouTube, Disney+, Prime Video, JioHotstar, and HBO Max. WebSocket relay with heartbeat drift correction, 59 server tests, shipping on the Chrome Web Store. [Repo](https://github.com/ArnavGoel03/watch-together).
- [PCOD Tracker](https://pcod-tracker.vercel.app): AI-powered health-management app for women with PCOD/PCOS. Claude AI parses user rants and lab PDFs. Next.js 16, 15 Prisma models. Source private (medical-adjacent domain).
- [Gondilal Saraf](https://gondilalsaraf.com): Full-stack bilingual platform for Arnav's family's 150-year jewelry business (founded 1873). Live gold rates, AR try-on, Gemini AI descriptions, admin ERP. 15 Prisma models, 26 API routes, 85 tests. Source private (family-business IP).
- [Red Bull YouTube Sentiment Analytics](https://github.com/ArnavGoel03/redbull-youtube-analytics): End-term Social Media Analytics project. VADER sentiment on 500 YouTube comments. Net Sentiment Score +28.6 percentage points, roughly double the industry benchmark. 8-chart Excel dashboard, executive summary PDF.
- [U.S. Power Outages (DSC 80)](https://github.com/ArnavGoel03/Power-grid-analysis): DSC 80 project analysing 1,534 major U.S. power outages (2000 to 2016). Random Forest with engineered features. RMSE 6,189 minutes, R² 0.220. Fairness checks across weather and non-weather outages.
- [MLB Playoff Prediction (COGS 108)](https://youtu.be/nEdCi9loxAI): Team project investigating predictive power of early-season run differential, OPS, and ERA on MLB playoff qualification 2015 to 2023. Arnav led the ethics section.
- [Anduril Industries, MGT 127R S-Curve Case](https://youtu.be/gMxLb814kPM): Final group case study analysing Anduril Industries as a new S-curve in defense technology.
- [ARK Invest, MGT 127R](https://youtu.be/iEqXolIMZVE): Week 9 case opening on ARK Invest's disruptive-technology investment strategy.
- [Human Activity Recognition (CSE 158)](https://youtu.be/5Jzb_5LDcEg): Time-series classification from wearable-sensor data. Feature engineering across time and frequency domains.
- [Handwritten Digits Classifier](https://github.com/ArnavGoel03/handwritten-digits-classifier): TensorFlow/Keras CNN on MNIST, about 99.2% test accuracy.
- [Pet Classifier](https://github.com/ArnavGoel03/pet-classifier): MobileNetV2 transfer learning on the Oxford-IIIT Pet Dataset (37 breeds).
(Fair Ludo, a consumer Ludo app with commit-reveal provably-fair dice, is pre-build and listed on [Ideas](https://arnavgoel.dev/ideas) as an open co-founding opportunity, not yet on the projects grid.)

## Experience

- [Experience](https://arnavgoel.dev/experience): Full work history with dates, scope, and skills.
- Triton Quantitative Trading, UCSD (Apr 2025 to Present): Systematic strategy research on tick-level data; Python, pandas, NumPy, time-series, backtesting.
- ADA, SWE Intern (Oct to Dec 2024): Built Flask microservices and the Nurse Panel API for a multi-region hospital platform projected to onboard 50,000+ patients. Cut setup time 60% via Docker.
- Espire Infolabs, Cloud Engineering Intern (Jul to Sep 2024): KPI dashboards and real-time monitoring on Azure Monitor, AWS Lambda, CloudWatch.
- AGS, Algorithmic Trading Intern (Jun to Sep 2023): High-frequency arbitrage strategies, Python backtesting on 10+ years of tick data, Monte Carlo volatility stress-testing.
- Gondilal Saraf, Digital Platform Lead (2022 to Present): Building the full-stack platform for the family jewelry business.

## Coursework

- [Coursework](https://arnavgoel.dev/coursework): Every UCSD course with grade and quarter, pulled from the official degree audit (April 2026).
- Key upper-division ML/DS: CSE 150A (AI: Probabilistic Models), CSE 151A (ML: Learning Algorithms), CSE 151B (Deep Learning, Summer 2026), CSE 158R (Recommender Systems & Web Mining), LIGN 167 (Deep Learning for NLP), COGS 108 (Data Science in Practice), DSC 80 (Practice of Data Science), DSC 100 (Data Management), DSC 190 (Topics in Data Science).
- Math and statistics: MATH 18, 20A to 20D, 109, 183 (Statistical Methods), 189 (Data Analysis and Inference).
- Entrepreneurship & Innovation minor: MGT 16, 103, 121A, 121B, 127R (AI & Technology Strategy), 175 (Supply Chain Management), 187 (New Venture Finance).
